channel.title: Vulncheck KEV
channel.description: Newly added vulnerabilities to the VulnCheck KEV database

item.title: [vulncheck] CVE-2019-20504 - quest kace_systems_management Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an OS Command ('OS Command Injection')
item.description:
service/krashrpt.php in Quest KACE K1000 Systems Management Appliance before 6.4 SP3 (6.4.120822) allows a remote attacker to execute code via shell metacharacters in the kuid parameter.

Vendor: quest
Product: kace_systems_management

VulnCheck Reported Exploitation Citations:
  • https://dashboard.shadowserver.org/statistics/honeypot/vulnerability/map/?day=2024-06-29&host_type=src&vulnerability=cve-2019-20504

item.title: [vulncheck] CVE-2018-10942 - attribute_wizard_project attribute_wizard Unrestricted Upload of File with Dangerous Type
item.description:
modules/attributewizardpro/file_upload.php in the Attribute Wizard addon 1.6.9 for PrestaShop 1.4.0.1 through 1.6.1.18 allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code by uploading a .phtml file.

Vendor: attribute_wizard_project
Product: attribute_wizard

VulnCheck Reported Exploitation Citations:
  • https://dashboard.shadowserver.org/statistics/honeypot/vulnerability/map/?day=2024-06-28&host_type=src&vulnerability=cve-2018-10942
  • https://dashboard.shadowserver.org/statistics/honeypot/vulnerability/map/?day=2024-06-30&host_type=src&vulnerability=cve-2018-10942

item.title: [vulncheck] CVE-2024-22729 - netis-systems mw5360_firmware Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in a Command ('Command Injection')
item.description:
NETIS SYSTEMS MW5360 V1.0.1.3031 was discovered to contain a command injection vulnerability via the password parameter on the login page.

Vendor: netis-systems
Product: mw5360_firmware

VulnCheck Reported Exploitation Citations:
  • https://dashboard.shadowserver.org/statistics/honeypot/vulnerability/map/?day=2024-06-27&host_type=src&vulnerability=cve-2024-22729
  • https://dashboard.shadowserver.org/statistics/honeypot/vulnerability/map/?day=2024-06-28&host_type=src&vulnerability=cve-2024-22729
  • https://dashboard.shadowserver.org/statistics/honeypot/vulnerability/map/?day=2024-06-29&host_type=src&vulnerability=cve-2024-22729
  • https://dashboard.shadowserver.org/statistics/honeypot/vulnerability/map/?day=2024-06-30&host_type=src&vulnerability=cve-2024-22729

item.title: [vulncheck] CVE-2022-23178 - crestron hd-md4x2-4k-e_firmware Improper Authentication
item.description:
An issue was discovered on Crestron HD-MD4X2-4K-E 1.0.0.2159 devices. When the administrative web interface of the HDMI switcher is accessed unauthenticated, user credentials are disclosed that are valid to authenticate to the web interface. Specifically, aj.html sends a JSON document with uname and upassword fields.

Vendor: crestron
Product: hd-md4x2-4k-e_firmware

VulnCheck Reported Exploitation Citations:
  • https://dashboard.shadowserver.org/statistics/honeypot/vulnerability/map/?day=2024-06-26&host_type=src&vulnerability=cve-2022-23178
  • https://dashboard.shadowserver.org/statistics/honeypot/vulnerability/map/?day=2024-06-28&host_type=src&vulnerability=cve-2022-23178

item.title: [vulncheck] CVE-2020-13965 - Roundcube Webmail Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) Vulnerability
item.description:
Roundcube Webmail contains a cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability that allows a remote attacker to manipulate data via a malicious XML attachment.

Date Added to CISA KEV: 2024-06-26T00:00:00Z
Vendor: Roundcube
Product: Roundcube Webmail

VulnCheck Reported Exploitation Citations:
  • https://www.cisa.gov/sites/default/files/feeds/known_exploited_vulnerabilities.json

item.title: [vulncheck] CVE-2023-2215 - coffee_shop_pos_system_project coffee_shop_pos_system Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection')
item.description:
A vulnerability classified as critical has been found in Campcodes Coffee Shop POS System 1.0. Affected is an unknown function of the file /admin/user/manage_user.php. The manipulation of the argument id leads to sql injection. It is possible to launch the attack remotely. The exploit has been disclosed to the public and may be used. The identifier of this vulnerability is VDB-226980.

Vendor: coffee_shop_pos_system_project
Product: coffee_shop_pos_system

VulnCheck Reported Exploitation Citations:
  • https://www.trustwave.com/hubfs/Web/Library/Documents_pdf/2024_Trustwave_Professional_Services_Sector_Threat_Landscape.pdf
VulnCheck XDB Entries:
  • https://vulncheck.com/xdb/2c8f0f2c3646 - https://github.com/zwxxb/CVE-2023-2215

item.title: [vulncheck] CVE-2024-28995 - SolarWinds Serv-U Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal')
item.description:
SolarWinds Serv-U was susceptible to a directory transversal vulnerability that would allow access to read sensitive files on the host machine.

Vendor: SolarWinds
Product: Serv-U

VulnCheck Reported Exploitation Citations:
  • https://dashboard.shadowserver.org/statistics/honeypot/vulnerability/map/?day=2024-06-25&host_type=src&vulnerability=cve-2024-28995

  • https://dashboard.shadowserver.org/statistics/honeypot/vulnerability/map/?day=2024-06-28&host_type=src&vulnerability=cve-2024-28995
  • https://dashboard.shadowserver.org/statistics/honeypot/vulnerability/map/?day=2024-06-29&host_type=src&vulnerability=cve-2024-28995
  • https://dashboard.shadowserver.org/statistics/honeypot/vulnerability/map/?day=2024-06-30&host_type=src&vulnerability=cve-2024-28995
VulnCheck XDB Entries:

item.title: [vulncheck] CVE-2024-5806 - Progress MOVEit Transfer SFTP Module Authentication Bypass
item.description:
Improper Authentication vulnerability in Progress MOVEit Transfer (SFTP module) can lead to Authentication Bypass.This issue affects MOVEit Transfer: from 2023.0.0 before 2023.0.11, from 2023.1.0 before 2023.1.6, from 2024.0.0 before 2024.0.2.v

Vendor: Progress
Product: MOVEit Transfer

VulnCheck Reported Exploitation Citations:
  • https://dashboard.shadowserver.org/statistics/honeypot/vulnerability/map/?day=2024-06-26&host_type=src&vulnerability=cve-2024-5806
  • https://dashboard.shadowserver.org/statistics/honeypot/vulnerability/map/?day=2024-06-27&host_type=src&vulnerability=cve-2024-5806
  • https://dashboard.shadowserver.org/statistics/honeypot/vulnerability/map/?day=2024-06-28&host_type=src&vulnerability=cve-2024-5806
  • https://www.linkedin.com/feed/update/urn:li:activity:7211444166466142210/
  • https://www.tenable.com/blog/cve-2024-5806-progress-moveit-transfer-authentication-bypass-vulnerability
  • https://x.com/Shadowserver/status/1805676078620401831
VulnCheck XDB Entries:
  • https://vulncheck.com/xdb/0c37c1c99a26 - https://github.com/watchtowrlabs/watchTowr-vs-progress-moveit_CVE-2024-5806

item.title: [vulncheck] CVE-2024-0769 - D-Link dir-859_firmware Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal')
item.description:
** UNSUPPORTED WHEN ASSIGNED ** A vulnerability was found in D-Link DIR-859 1.06B01. It has been rated as critical. Affected by this issue is some unknown functionality of the file /hedwig.cgi of the component HTTP POST Request Handler. The manipulation of the argument service with the input ../../../../htdocs/webinc/getcfg/DHCPS6.BRIDGE-1.xml leads to path traversal. The attack may be launched remotely. The exploit has been disclosed to the public and may be used. VDB-251666 is the identifier assigned to this vulnerability. NOTE: This vulnerability only affects products that are no longer supported by the maintainer. NOTE: Vendor was contacted early and confirmed immediately that the product is end-of-life. It should be retired and replaced.

Vendor: D-Link
Product: dir-859_firmware

VulnCheck Reported Exploitation Citations:
  • https://www.labs.greynoise.io/grimoire/2024-06-25-dlink-again/

item.title: [vulncheck] CVE-2024-29973 - Zyxel NAS setCookie Crafted HTTP POST Vulnerability
item.description:
The command injection vulnerability in the 'setCookie' parameter in Zyxel NAS326 firmware versions before V5.21(AAZF.17)C0 and NAS542 firmware versions before V5.21(ABAG.14)C0 could allow an unauthenticated attacker to execute some operating system (OS) commands by sending a crafted HTTP POST request.

Vendor: NAS
Product: Zyxel

VulnCheck Reported Exploitation Citations:
  • https://dashboard.shadowserver.org/statistics/honeypot/vulnerability/map/?day=2024-06-27&host_type=src&vulnerability=cve-2024-29973
  • https://dashboard.shadowserver.org/statistics/honeypot/vulnerability/map/?day=2024-06-28&host_type=src&vulnerability=cve-2024-29973
  • https://dashboard.shadowserver.org/statistics/honeypot/vulnerability/map/?day=2024-06-29&host_type=src&vulnerability=cve-2024-29973
  • https://dashboard.shadowserver.org/statistics/honeypot/vulnerability/map/?day=2024-06-30&host_type=src&vulnerability=cve-2024-29973
  • https://www.theregister.com/2024/06/24/mirailike_botnet_zyxel_nas/
VulnCheck XDB Entries:
  • https://vulncheck.com/xdb/f6609fb90315 - https://github.com/momika233/CVE-2024-29973
  • https://vulncheck.com/xdb/4e87a1cc9d12 - https://github.com/p0et08/CVE-2024-29973
